privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how ROOO "NOMOS (Law & Order)" ("we", "us", "our") collects, uses, and protects your personal data in accordance with applicable data protection laws.

dataCollected.heading: Data We Collect
dataCollected.description: We collect and process the following personal data:

items.name: Full name (first name, last name, middle name)

legalBasis.heading: Legal Basis for Processing
legalBasis.description: We process your personal data based on your explicit consent given during registration. You may withdraw your consent at any time by contacting us.

thirdParties.heading: Third-Party Data Sharing
thirdParties.description: We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties, except as required by law or with your explicit consent. We may use third-party services for infrastructure purposes (hosting, SMS delivery), which process data strictly on our behalf.

retention.heading: Data Retention
retention.description: Your personal data is retained for the duration of your account activity. Voting records are retained indefinitely to ensure the integrity and legal validity of decisions made through the platform. You may request deletion of your account data by contacting us.

items.deletion: Request deletion of your data (subject to legal retention requirements)
items.portability: Receive your data in a portable format

contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.description: For any questions about this Privacy Policy or to exercise your rights, contact us at: {email}

updates.heading: Policy Updates
updates.description: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any significant changes through the platform. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
